people_or_roles: Ten executives and employees across four firms
event_or_allegation: DOJ and IRS-CI announced charges tied to alleged wash trading and pump-and-dump schemes; more than $1 million in cryptocurrency had been seized

people_or_roles: Antoine Tsao, Ian Sofronov, Nemanja Popov
event_or_allegation: Charged with wire fraud conspiracy and wire fraud for allegedly inflating the price of a cryptocurrency token
DOJ said Tsao pleaded guilty and was sentenced on June 2, 2025; Popov pleaded guilty and was sentenced on February 10, 2026

people_or_roles: Manu Singh, Kushagra Srivastava, Vasu Sharma, Sabby Singh
